## Summary

Describe the purpose and scope of this change.

## Validation

- [ ] Relevant tests or validation commands pass
- [ ] Documentation has been updated where needed
- [ ] No secrets, private records, production data, or unredacted diagnostics are included
- [ ] Operational changes have a rollback path

## Risk and rollback

Describe the expected risk and how the change can be reversed safely.

## Screenshots

Add sanitized screenshots when the browser interface changes.
